\tzpentry{ID3555}{Concept Units Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3555 introduces Concept Units Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ I(\ell_\varphi) = \int_0^{\infty} \!r\,dr \int_0^{2\pi}\! d\theta\, \psi_1^*(r,\theta)\, \delta_\epsilon(r)\, \psi_2(r,\theta) \]
